stem: A scatterplot in the xy-plane has 6 data points trending down from left to right showing the relationship between distance above sea level (in feet) and average temperature (in degrees Fahrenheit). A line of best fit passes through the coordinates (0, 60), (3,000, 45), and (6,000, 30). At a distance of 3,000 feet above sea level, what is the temperature, in degrees Fahrenheit, predicted by the line of best fit?
rationale:
Choice D is correct. The line of best fit passes through (3,000, 45), so the predicted temperature at 3,000 feet is 45°F.

The other choices are temperatures at different elevations.
